name: brand
tagline: Manages brand voice, visual identity, messaging, and asset/design-token consistency via a subcommand router into reference files and.
verdict: Compact routing skill with a clean SKILL.md/references split and a coherent file-sync model (brand-guidelines.md to design-tokens.json/css). Weak on guardrails: no stated exclusions despite covering broad brand/content/asset territory, the core routing step ('Execute with remaining arguments') has no detail, no example of the doc-to-token transform, no.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or scope-exclusion text anywhere despite broad territory (voice, visuals, messaging, assets) that could overlap with adjacent content/design skills.
Routing step '3. Execute with remaining arguments' gives no detail on what executing means or how outcomes are decided.
No mention of what to do if any script (inject-brand-context.cjs, sync-brand-to-tokens.cjs, validate-asset.cjs) fails or errors.
